description: Cashier and waiter We are looking for a cashier for our lunch restaurant. Duties include working at the cash register, customer service and taking care of the cleanliness of the hall. description: Family caregiver (gig job), Onnikoti Aalto, Pori Family caregiver (gig job), Onnikoti Aalto, Pori Come and do guidance work for people with intellectual disabilities at the unique group facility Onnikoti Aalto, Pori! We are now looking for caregivers for temporary work in our new, beautiful and modern home. Become an enabler of a good everyday life for us! Where do you come to work? We are opening a new Housing Unit for adults with developmental disabilities in the Tikkula district of Pori in the spring of 2026. Onnikoti Aalto will offer 24-hour serviced housing for 14 people and community housing for 7 people. The services are produced in new facilities designed for the purpose. Accessibility and comfort have been taken into account in the design of the facilities. What can you do?

title: Foreman in Kotka

meta_description: Rekrymesta Henkilöstöpalvelut Oy is hiring a Foreman in Kotka in Kouvola. Explore responsibilities, benefits, and apply today.
description: Foreman in Kotka Become a foreman for us! We are looking for a motivated foreman for versatile projects for our client. You have the opportunity to develop your professional skills in interesting tasks. At work, you get to perform the tasks of a foreman in a versatile destination, surrounded by a comfortable and relaxed work team. You can already be an experienced conker or, for example, a graduating engineer who is looking for work experience in tasks in the field. The works are located in the Kotka area.
what_we_expect: A valid work safety and electrical work safety card
The possibility of using your own car is considered an advantage
At least one year of experience in the electrical field
job_responsibilities: Varied tasks in a growing company in the field
what_we_offer: Versatile tasks in a growing company in the field
A good and relaxed work team
For a good worker, the opportunity for a longer-term employment relationship
The opportunity to develop as an expert in the field
Please submit your application as soon as possible, as the position will be filled as soon as a suitable person is found.

title: HVAC installer
meta_description: Looking for a HVAC installer job in Vantaa? LVI-palvelu Myller Oy, Vantaa is seeking motivated candidates—apply today.
description: HVAC installer HVAC installer/HVAC Service Myller Oy Hello, you HVAC installation professional! Are you ready to jump into an exciting and developing job, where your skills are valued and your strengths are taken into account? Task/who we are looking for: LVI-Palvelu Myller Oy is looking for an experienced and competent HVAC installer in the PK region to carry out versatile pipe installation work. We require the applicant to have two years of HVAC work experience in maintenance and renovation projects, the ability to work independently, and a professional degree in the field. We value self-initiatives and an active approach to work in the applicant. We also expect the applicant to be enthusiastic about learning new things and have sufficient Finnish language skills.
job_responsibilities: Industrial heating, air conditioning and cooling system installer
what_we_offer: Please send your application as soon as possible, because we are already interviewing applicants during the application period. The position will be filled when a suitable person is found.
You can also call and ask for more information about the position: Ville Myller, tel. +358 400 486 904
search_keywords: HVAC Installer LVI-palvelu Myller Oy, Vantaa Vantaa installation-and-maintenance
